---
title: "Facial first impressions form two clusters representing approach-avoidance"
authors: "Jones, A. L., & Kramer, R."
year: 2021
date: 2021-01-01
pub-journal: "Cognitive Psychology"
volume: "126"
pages: "101387"
doi: "10.1016/j.cogpsych.2021.101387"
pdf: "assets/papers/2021/Jones & Kramer 2021.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions, methodology, bayesian]
---
